name: Aah!
overview: Aah is a spine-tingling 36-episode supernatural thriller adapted from the acclaimed Tamil anthology novel by Suriya Rethnna. Each week a chilling story unfolds, weaving hauntings of love, betrayal and vengeance into a larger narrative that follows Aditya as he faces the terrifying legacy of his mother Devi, whose grip from beyond the grave refuses to fade. From cursed homes and eerie hospital wards to a family bistro steeped in secrets, Aah blurs the line between the living and the dead.

trailers.title: Tension brews the moment Ashwini steps into the kitchen and things are about to heat up. 🔥🍲 #Aah
What happens when the living and the unseen collide? 👀  #Aah
Chitra hears eerie sounds and sees strange things along Ward 36. 👀  #Aah
